title: Zelda: Wand of Gamelon Intro (Original Dutch version) [RARE]
description:
Voice Cast: 

Link: Just Meijer 
Zelda, Wizzrobe: Maria Lindes
King Harkinian/Ganon/Baker/Mayor Mayor Kravindish/Duke Onkled: Carol van Herwijnen 
Impa, Lady Alma, Cape woman in the forest: Beatrijs Sluijters

English subtitles now avalible.

I finally got my hands on the dutch verion of Zelda: Wand of Gamelon. 

Please rate, comment and enjoy.

Feel free to use it in your poops.
